description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-drawer

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-drawer/`

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE FOR SCORING
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `validate_usage`, `list_css_parts`, `list_events`, `list_slots`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report any wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Surface, overlay, width, shadow. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. dialog role. Focus trap. Return focus on close. Escape to dismiss. aria-labelledby.
3. **Functionality** — Left/right/top/bottom placement. Overlay click dismiss. Contained mode. Push content. Header/body/footer slots. Animation (slide).
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. Slide animation. Overlay. Z-index. Responsive width.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All API documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Open/close. Focus trap. Placement. Overlay. Keyboard.
8. **Storybook** — Placements. Contained. With navigation content. Sizes.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Off-canvas replacement. Admin toolbar. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-drawer
